---
description: Project-local conventions while working inside a lit-review project folder
applyTo: "projects/**"
---

You are operating inside a specific literature-review project folder.

- Per-project files live here. Do not modify shared agent code under `agent/` or
  `tools/` to satisfy this project's needs — propose an upstream change instead.
- Citation keys are lowercase alphanumeric (e.g., `lewis2020rag`). Match the
  convention declared in this project's `intake.md`.
- Every claim in `synthesis.md` and `lit-review.md` ends with `[@key]` (or `[key]`
  in synthesis) and the key must exist in this project's `catalog.json`. No
  fabricated citations.
- Catalog edits go through `tools/catalog.py`, not by hand-editing `catalog.json`.
- `references.bib` is generated by `tools/build_bib.py`; do not hand-edit.
- PDFs live in `papers/<key>.pdf` and are gitignored. Do not commit them.
